customAttributes.description:
Avatar: The Last Airbender: The Ember Island Players

Cumulative upkeep—Add R.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair x Avatar: The Last Airbender: The Ember Island Players and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 11/25/2025 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText:
“The dreams of my father, and my father’s father, have now been realized. The world is mine!”
—Ozai, from The Boy in the Iceberg
